site.name: Twisted Bar & Grill
site.hoursNote: Weekend brunch Sat & Sun · Happy hour weekdays · 4–7 PM

hero.tagline: One place, every experience. Till 2 AM all 7 days.
hero.description: DFW's most electrifying bar & grill — handcrafted cocktails, draft beers on tap, fire-grilled plates, late open kitchen till 1 AM and premium upscale lounge seating. Premium Hookah. Live bands, DJs and dance floor vibes. Weekend brunch. Air-conditioned covered patio and open-air courtyard oasis. Right by Grandscape, in the middle of DFW metroplex.

about.label: About Us
about.title: More Than a Bar. An Entertainment Destination
about.subtitle: Twisted is where North DFW comes together — whether you're in Frisco, Plano, Prosper, Lewisville, McKinney, Allen, Little Elm, Carrollton, or Irving. Twisted is your go to destination for live sports watch parties, trivia nights, service industry nights, karaoke nights, ladies nights, international music nights, live music performances, themed parties, R&B weekend brunches and community celebrations from open to close. Walk in with your crew, book a private event, celebrate a birthday or anniversary or graduation or a milestone of life or just go with the flow and relax. The kitchen is open late till 1am. Bar serving until 2 AM, every night of the week.

features.title: Handcrafted Cocktails
features.body: Signature cocktails, draft beers on tap, wine, and specialty pours from our full bar.

features.title: Hookah Lounge
features.body: Upscale lounge seating and premium hookah — ask your server for flavors and pricing.

features.title: Sports Bar
features.body: 175″ LED wall, 150″ screen, and large TVs in every corner — all paired with a hi-fi audio system for game day and live events.

features.title: Fire-Grilled Plates
features.body: Burgers, wings, tacos, and fan favorites from our kitchen — cooked to order and served hot.

features.title: Patio & Courtyard
features.body: Covered patio and open-air courtyard seating — brunch, dinner, or drinks under the Texas sky.

features.title: Live Music
features.body: Live music every Friday and Saturday night — feel the beat at Twisted.

features.title: Weekend Brunch
features.body: Saturday R&B brunch and Sunday paint & sip brunch, both 11 AM – 4 PM.

gallery.spaceTitle: A Modern Sports Lounge in North DFW
gallery.spaceBody1: Massive 175” LED wall, 150” Screen and 4K TVs in every corner, comfortable booths, patio seating, and a full bar — whether you're catching the game or meeting friends for dinner, Twisted has you covered.
gallery.spaceBody2: Located at Cascades Court near Grandscape and Topgolf — the go-to spot for North Dallas suburbs including Frisco, Lewisville, Plano, and Carrollton.
gallery.barBody1: Signature cocktails, beer and wine, and premium hookah in a comfortable lounge setting — whether you're here for the game or a night out with friends.
gallery.barBody2: Ask your server about drink specials and hookah flavors.

events_teaser.label: Events
events_teaser.title: Something's Always Happening
events_teaser.body: Happy hour, karaoke, live music, and weekend brunch — seven days of drinks, food, and good vibes at Twisted near Grandscape.

menu_highlights.title: Twisted Potato
menu_highlights.body: Ribbon crispy potato topped with house seasoning salt

menu_highlights.title: Chicken 65
menu_highlights.body: Fried battered chicken tossed in our house 65 sauce

menu_highlights.title: Baja Fish Taco
menu_highlights.body: Battered Arctic cod with coleslaw & jalapeño ranch

menu_highlights.title: Angus Beef Burger
menu_highlights.body: Fresh beef patty with cheese, LTOP & mayo

menu_highlights.title: Nashville Chicken Sandwich
menu_highlights.body: Fried chicken dipped in Nashville sauce with cheese & mayo

menu_highlights.title: Loaded Nachos
menu_highlights.body: Corn chips, beans, pico, jalapeños, cheese, sour cream & guacamole

items.author: Vidya Garapati
items.text: Amazing experience! Great ambience, perfect music, and top-notch service. The drinks were spot on, and the food was fresh and delicious. Definitely coming back!

items.author: Megan Mitchell
items.text: Perfect spot to unwind with hookah. The energy is lively without being overwhelming, music hits just right, and the staff was cool. A go-to for a chill night out.

items.author: Chaitanya Kumar
items.text: The music selection was fantastic and the DJ kept the crowd engaged. The courtyard was my favorite — hookah and cocktails under the trees felt like a resort. Flavorful food and great service.

items.author: Jenu
items.text: A great sports bar with an extensive beer selection, solid food menu, and lively atmosphere. Perfect for catching a game and enjoying a cold drink with friends.

items.author: Crystal T.
items.text: Overall, 9 out of 10. I will be going back.

links.tagline: Sports Bar & Grill · The Colony, TX

events_page.label: Weekly Schedule
events_page.title: Events Every Week
events_page.body: Happy hour Monday through Thursday, karaoke, Ladies Lounge, live music, and weekend brunch — something on the calendar every day of the week.
events_page.privateBody: Planning a birthday, corporate event, or large group? Call us and our team will follow up with details.
